Container.Name: pmse-to-wwb
Container.Overview: Built with Claude AI (Anthropic). Upload an Ofcom PMSE radio mic licence PDF and generate frequency import files for Shure Wireless Workbench: a WWB-native frequency list, a named reference sheet, and an experimental WWB7 show file. See the project README before relying on the show-file output for a real show.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the web interface
